title: Hiring Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
